raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The fixed-charge electricity price proposal program could exploit low-income residential customers.",
    "The proposal could be seen as a regressive plan that fails to account for varying energy usage among households.",
    "Californians pay energy rates that are up to 80 percent higher than the national average.",
    "The proposed fixed-rate fee structure could make electricity even more expensive for California residents.",
    "Under the proposed plan, low-income families could incur hundreds of dollars in additional yearly utility fees, irrespective of their electricity usage.",
    "The fixed-charge proposal contradicts principles of fair pricing and consumer protection.",
    "The proposal may discourage energy conservation and sustainable living."
  ]
}
```
